guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep INP low — keep heavy JS off the interaction path.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — letterbox + onnxruntime-web session.run + head decode all run in a Web Worker; the webcam loop is rAF-paced so a slow frame never blocks input.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless: detect 213–216 ms in the worker, main-thread eval responsive, 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Offload / break up long main-thread tasks.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — all inference is off the main thread; ImageBitmap frames are transferred (zero-copy) to the worker.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: worker.js runs session.run; yolo.js detect() transfers the bitmap

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Pause heavy background work when the content is not visible.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the live-webcam loop is driven by requestAnimationFrame (auto-throttled when the tab is hidden) with a visibilitychange status, and getUserMedia tracks are stopped on Stop.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: wild/index.html loop guards on document.hidden + video.readyState

guidanceConsulted.query: real-time webcam video canvas overlay without blocking the main thread
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: rAF-driven loop + off-thread inference + ImageBitmap transfer; draw overlay at natural resolution and CSS-scale.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — drawDetections renders at the source's natural size and CSS scales it, so boxes stay pixel-accurate.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label every control; announce state in a live region.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live loader, labelled buttons/sliders/select, keyboard-operable dropzone + sample thumbnails; images carry alt text.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page nav.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in the shared public/styles.css.

followUpGoals.goal: Add a WebGPU execution-provider fast path for yolov10-detection (honest WASM fallback retained) as an additive enhancement.

summary: Revision-2 agent matrix pass for yolov10-detection: real download + on-device run verified in headless Chrome (real output samples recorded), light+dark and mobile+desktop screenshots reviewed (no overflow, legible, operable controls), console clean. Auto-checkable conformance assertions pass (14/14 tested); manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdict above.
